United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Poker
programme.desc: Poker action from tournaments around the world.

programme.desc: From March 26, 2026.

programme.title: Poker
programme.desc: Poker action from tournaments around the world.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: DraftKings Casino Report
programme.desc: DraftKings Casino, a top-rated casino app!

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: Men's Health - All-Natural Secret for Prostate Health
programme.desc: Prosvent is a doctor-formulated blend of rejuvenating herbs and nutrients that help protect overall prostate health.

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: Bathroom Makeover
programme.desc: Transform your bath affordably in just one day!

programme.title: Natural Blood Pressure Management
programme.desc: Cardiologist Dr. Ernst von Schwarz, M.D. shows how to manage your blood pressure naturally and help protect your heart for life with My Best Heart.

programme.title: DraftKings Casino Report
programme.desc: DraftKings Casino, a top-rated casino app!

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: Giants Access Blue
programme.desc: Everything you need to know about your NY Giants.

programme.title: Best of Devils
programme.desc: From March 29, 2026.

programme.title: Poker
programme.desc: Poker action from tournaments around the world.

programme.title: Best of Devils
programme.desc: From April 5, 2026.

programme.title: Poker
programme.desc: Poker action from tournaments around the world.

programme.title: Fight Sports: Boxing
programme.desc: Replays of classic boxing matches.

programme.title: Fight Sports MMA
programme.desc: Fights featuring mixed martial artists from around the world.

programme.title: SIGN OFF
programme.desc: Sign off.

programme.title: SIGN OFF
programme.desc: Sign off.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: From Citi Field in Flushing, N.Y.

programme.title: Red Sox Extra Innings Live
programme.desc: A complete breakdown of the game, postgame reaction from the players, and highlights from around the league.

programme.title: Live: Red Sox Final
programme.desc: A complete breakdown of the game, postgame reaction from the players and highlights from around the league.

programme.title: Charlie Moore Outdoors
programme.desc: Charlie hooks up with 18-year MLB player and Hall of Famer Wade Boggs; Charlie and Wade fish the world-famous Charles River in Boston; Wade takes Charlie to the 7-20-4 Lounge for an impromptu interview; Wade and Charlie compare World Series rings.

programme.title: Charlie Moore Outdoors
programme.desc: Charlie heads out with NHL Hall of Famer Ray Bourque to attend Ray's Celebrities for Charity event. Ray challenges Mad Fish to catch some bass out on the course. Charlie bumps into a bunch of NHL legends and sneaks in a free golf lesson.

programme.title: Travel Moore With Anthony Moore
programme.desc: Anthony heads to Tewksbury, Mass., for a visit to Wamesit Lanes Family Entertainment Center. Owner Donny MacLaren gives Anthony a VIP tour and takes part in dart throwing, shuffleboard, bowling, arcades and some great burgers.

programme.title: Travel Moore With Anthony Moore
programme.desc: Join in as we unlock New Hampshire's gate city. We are heading to Nashua for a day packed of nostalgia at Fun World followed by some authentic Italian dishes, sweet treats and a local beer flight to top things off.

programme.title: Cruisin' New England
programme.desc: Paul Mennett heads to the Berkshires to visit Jay Hanlon to drive a vintage tractor, a vintage snow cat, as well as fly in a vintage airplane.

programme.title: Outside the Fame
programme.desc: An in-depth look into the lives of current and former New England athletes that Boston fans may not otherwise have a chance to see.

programme.title: The Drift
programme.desc: The best in boating lifestyles, marine products and destinations; a must follow for boat builders, enthusiasts and everyone else interested in learning about the world of sailing.

programme.title: Dining Playbook With Billy and Jenny
programme.desc: A sports-themed look at the New England dining and lifestyle scene featuring celebrity chefs and favorite restaurants of local athletes.

programme.title: Meet Boston With Billy & Jenny
programme.desc: Boston influencers showcase different areas of the city and off-the-radar things to do.

programme.title: Wicked Bites
programme.desc: We're touring Metrowest's best patio dining and scenic spots in the Lakes Region. Plus, we go behind the scenes at Danvers' legendary Putnam Pantry to explore their historic candy kitchen and world-famous ice cream.

programme.title: New England Traveler
programme.desc: After a long, cold winter, Greg heads south of the border to Cancun, Mexico for a warm-weather escape. Atelier Resort in Playa Mujeres sets the stage for sailboat adventures, Caribbean cocktails, authentic Mexican cuisine, and a few surprises.

programme.title: Dirty Water TV
programme.desc: The best parties, hottest venues, and coolest destinations in New England nightlife.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: From Citi Field in Flushing, N.Y.

programme.title: Red Sox Extra Innings Live
programme.desc: A complete breakdown of the game, postgame reaction from the players, and highlights from around the league.

programme.title: Red Sox Final
programme.desc: A complete breakdown of the game, postgame reaction from the players and highlights from around the league.

programme.title: On the Water TV
programme.desc: Angling adventures showcasing the unique people, places and fish of the Northeast.

programme.title: Goliath Fishing
programme.desc: Captain James Marko chases fish all around south Florida.

programme.title: Wingshooting USA
programme.desc: Described as a cross between "Dog Whisperer" and "A River Runs Through It" -- with shotguns, hunting adventures and incredible scenery thrown in -- "Wingshooting USA" depicts the fun and excitement of upland bird hunting and honors the dogs that make it all possible. Host Scott Linden provides a fast-paced mix of entertainment, education and information designed to motivate wingshooters of all exp

programme.title: Scott Martin Challenge
programme.desc: Scott Martin and a challenger go head-to-head in a unique fishing tournament format.

programme.title: USL Cup Soccer
programme.desc: From Fitzpatrick Stadium in Portland, Maine.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: From Citi Field in Flushing, N.Y.

programme.title: Hope for Pain Sufferers
programme.desc: In this compelling investigation, John Walsh delves into OmegaXL and its natural origins; discover how this innovative supplement can provide relief from joint pain and improve your quality of life, all grounded in extensive research.

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: Hope for Pain Sufferers
programme.desc: In this compelling investigation, John Walsh delves into OmegaXL and its natural origins; discover how this innovative supplement can provide relief from joint pain and improve your quality of life, all grounded in extensive research.

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: The Varsity With John Ourand
programme.desc: John Ourand and a rotating cast of industry insiders take you inside the executive suites and owners boxes where the decisions that shape the entire sports business are made; you'll hear interviews with players, execs and everyone in between.

programme.title: Live: The Hockey Hub
programme.desc: Hockey talk from NESN announcers that begins with the Bruins and expands to cover the greater New England hockey scene.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: From Citi Field in Flushing, N.Y.

programme.title: Live: Boston's Entered the Chat
programme.desc: A daily show featuring conversational debate that sets up the day in Boston sports. The format incorporates social media and timely guests to inform and entertain fans of New England sports teams.

programme.title: The Varsity With John Ourand
programme.desc: John Ourand and a rotating cast of industry insiders take you inside the executive suites and owners boxes where the decisions that shape the entire sports business are made; you'll hear interviews with players, execs and everyone in between.

programme.title: Big League Wiffle Ball
programme.desc: Coverage of wiffle ball action from the professional league.

programme.title: America Says
programme.desc: John Michael Higgins hosts as two teams of friends race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Family Feud is an American television game show where two families compete to name the responses to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Celebrity Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: Celebrity contestants Kel Mitchell, Kim Fields and Penn Jillette.

programme.title: Celebrity Jeopardy!
programme.desc: Celebrity contestants Utkarsh Ambudkar, Mira Sorvino and Lisa Ann Walter.

programme.title: The Wall
programme.desc: Veteran and his wife vie for the prize.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Family Feud is an American television game show where two families compete to name the responses to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Family Feud Favorites
programme.desc: "Family Feud" has seen some crazy moments over the years, so buckle up as we revisit these fan favorites.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Cedeno family vs. Speer family.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Reicks family vs. Cedeno family.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Eligon family vs. Reicks family.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Brown family vs. Eligon family.

programme.title: Pain Relief Revealed
programme.desc: Discover the hidden story of OmegaXL with John Walsh. He dives deep into the groundbreaking supplement that promises hope and relief for millions battling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: Inogen Portable Oxygen - No More Tanks!
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Joint Relief Revolution
programme.desc: Join Connie Craig-Carroll and health visionary Ken Meares as they uncover OmegaXL, the groundbreaking natural supplement transforming lives by tackling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Match Game
programme.desc: Gene Rayburn hosts this comedy-game show hybrid in which contestants try to match answers given by celebrities to humorous, and often risque, fill-in-the-blank questions. The contestant with the most points at the end of the game advances to play the bonus round, in which the contestant has a chance to win thousands of dollars, with the actual amount dependent on the rules in place at the time of

programme.title: Chain Reaction
programme.desc: Two teams of three compete to complete a chain of words after the first and last words in the chain are revealed.

programme.title: Catch 21
programme.desc: Aces For Everyone; players add cards by answering pop trivia questions and try to build the closest hand to 21 without busting in this fast-action game of knowledge and strategy.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unsuspecting taxi cab passengers answer trivia questions posed by host Ben Bailey; the passengers may reach their destination with cold hard cash or walk away empty-handed.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: In a classic game-show version of "Hangman," contestants solve word puzzles for cash and prizes.

programme.title: The $100,000 Pyramid
programme.desc: Wendi McLendon-Covey dukes it out against Matt Walsh; Amanda Kloots and Marcus Lemonis battle for their spot in the winner's circle.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from a penny to millions.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: In a classic game-show version of "Hangman," contestants solve word puzzles for cash and prizes.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: The Emmy-winning quiz show features a unique answer-and-question format.

programme.title: Master Minds
programme.desc: Brooke Burns and Mark "The Beast" Labbett reunite in an exciting showdown; three challengers take on great minds in trivia where the last one standing faces the top-scoring Master Mind for a chance to win big.

programme.title: The Perfect Line
programme.desc: Players Steven, Drahcir, Nate and Kaitlin.

programme.title: Flip Side
programme.desc: Cute siblings Greg and Bianca go after sweet mom and daughter Jillian and Sam.

programme.title: Chain Reaction
programme.desc: "Chain Reaction" is back with fan-favorite Dylan Lane returning as host of the popular word puzzle game in which players compete to form chains composed of two-word phrases.

programme.title: America Says
programme.desc: John Michael Higgins hosts as two teams of friends race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Victoria "The Queen" Groce graces the throne once again as the featured chaser, facing off in a battle of the brains against a diversity executive, a mystery writer and a Ph.D. student.

programme.title: The Wall
programme.desc: A married couple from Union, N.J., vies for the prize.

programme.title: America Says
programme.desc: John Michael Higgins hosts as two teams of friends race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun.

programme.desc: Coverage from a ninth-place semi-final (Kick-off 3.00pm), which takes place at Aia Arena in Kutaisi, Georgia.

programme.desc: Action from a quarter-final tie.

programme.title: Live Rugby Junior World Championship
programme.desc: Coverage from a ninth-place semi-final (Kick-off 5.30pm), which takes place at Aia Arena in Kutaisi, Georgia.

programme.title: Sporting Countdowns
programme.desc: Focusing on some of the most memorable moments in sports history.

programme.title: NHL Ice Hockey
programme.desc: Vegas Golden Knights v Carolina Hurricanes in game six of the Stanley Cup Finals.

programme.title: Africa Eco Race
programme.desc: The latest motorsport highlights from the Africa Eco race.

programme.title: DTM Motorsport Highlights
programme.desc: Action from Norisring.

programme.title: Rugby Junior World Championships
programme.desc: Action from a ninth-place semi-final.

programme.title: One Week In May...
programme.desc: The Story Of A Unique Treble: A documentary about the unforgettable 2000/01 season when Gerard Houllier¿s team charged to three trophies and Champions League qualification for the first time.

programme.title: LFC Trending
programme.desc: The week's most popular videos and social media highlights from across the Club, its players and supporters.

programme.title: Liverpool¿s Greatest
programme.desc: The winner of our Liverpools Greatest poll is revealed. See who is crowned the Reds' best men's player of all time, after a huge vote with the views of fans, former players, journalists and more.

programme.title: Robbo: All the goals and assists
programme.desc: Enjoy a collection of goals and assists by Andy Robertson.

programme.title: The Match
programme.desc: All the action as Liverpool take on Frankfurt.

programme.title: 130 Greatest LFC Goals
programme.desc: The complete countdown of Liverpool's most memorable goals; be it in terms of importance, iconic status or simply sheer quality - with the top 10 voted for by the fans back in 2022.

programme.title: How The Cup Was Won
programme.desc: Enjoy this round-by-round step back in time to the year Liverpool clinched their sixth success in the world's oldest knockout competition.

programme.title: LFC Trending
programme.desc: The week's most popular videos and social media highlights from across the Club, its players and supporters.

programme.title: Rush Scored Four
programme.desc: An LFC Original mini-documentary that relives the unforgettable afternoon at Goodison in 1982 when Ian Rush inspired the Reds to a famous 5-0 derby victory.

programme.title: Retro Reds - The Golden Hour
programme.desc: Relive classic LFC action from the archives. This week we recall the First Division fixtures against Manchester City), Bristol City (), Manchester United () and Nottingham Forest (.

programme.title: Ultimate XI
programme.desc: Former Liverpool midfielder Jan Molby takes on the role of fantasy manager and reveals who would make it into his Ultimate XI.

programme.title: Macca & Macca
programme.desc: Steve McManaman discusses his match-winning performance in the 1995 League Cup Final with his opponent that day, Jason McAteer.

programme.title: 130 Greatest LFC Goals
programme.desc: The complete countdown of Liverpool's most memorable goals; be it in terms of importance, iconic status or simply sheer quality - with the top 10 voted for by the fans back in 2022.

programme.title: The Match
programme.desc: All the action as Liverpool take on Aston Villa.

programme.title: Robbo: All the goals and assists
programme.desc: Enjoy a collection of goals and assists by Andy Robertson.

programme.title: Goal Rush
programme.desc: A collection of the best Liverpool goals scored by Virgil Van Dijk.

programme.title: Live: Press Conference
programme.desc: Join us live at the AXA Training Centre for Andoni Iraola's first press conference as the head coach of Liverpool FC.

programme.title: Goal Rush
programme.desc: Enjoy a selection of memorable goals scored by Dominik Szoboszlai.

programme.title: Goal Rush
programme.desc: Relive all the goals from Liverpool 2018/19 Champions League campaign.

programme.title: Goal Rush
programme.desc: A collection of the best Liverpool goals scored by Cody Gakpo.

programme.title: All the Goals
programme.desc: Relive every single goal Luis Suarez scored for the Reds.

programme.title: European Royalty: The Joy of Six
programme.desc: An exclusive documentary in which we relive Liverpool's sixth European Cup victory in Madrid - and the subsequent parade which brought the city to a standstill.

programme.title: Liverpool¿s Greatest
programme.desc: The winner of our Liverpools Greatest poll is revealed. See who is crowned the Reds' best men's player of all time, after a huge vote with the views of fans, former players, journalists and more.

programme.title: Robbo: All the goals and assists
programme.desc: Enjoy a collection of goals and assists by Andy Robertson.

programme.title: Press Conference
programme.desc: Join us at the AXA Training Centre for Andoni Iraola's first press conference as the head coach of Liverpool FC.

programme.title: One Week In May...
programme.desc: The Story Of A Unique Treble: A documentary about the unforgettable 2000/01 season when Gerard Houllier¿s team charged to three trophies and Champions League qualification for the first time.

programme.title: Premier League Heroes
programme.desc: How a young lad from Huyton became a football icon and possibly the best player ever to wear a red shirt of Liverpool FC.

programme.title: Mo Salah: Record Breaker
programme.desc: Former LFC striker Neil Mellor and Opta data editor Michael Reid crunch the numbers on Mohamed Salah¿s incredible Liverpool career, which saw the Egyptian King rewrite the record books.

programme.title: Rush Scored Four
programme.desc: An LFC Original mini-documentary that relives the unforgettable afternoon at Goodison in 1982 when Ian Rush inspired the Reds to a famous 5-0 derby victory.

programme.title: Lucas: 10 Years a Red
programme.desc: In the summer of 2017 Lucas Leiva called time on his Liverpool career and moved to Lazio. This documentary looks back on the popular Brazilian's decade at the club.

programme.title: Flags and Banners: The Art of LFC
programme.desc: An exclusive documentary which delves into the history and culture of the club's flags and banners.

programme.title: Retro Review Show
programme.desc: Steven Gerrard joins Neil Mellor to analyse the action and talk through the stats from the 2005 Champions league Final.

programme.title: Live: 2026 Kaulig Companies Championship
programme.desc: From Firestone Country Club South Course in Akron, Ohio.

programme.title: Live: PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: The Final Round of the ISCO Championship 2026 continues at Hurstbourne Country Club in Louisville. The final 18-hole loop crowns the champion, awards 300 FedEx Cup points, and determines the distribution of the $4 million total purse.

programme.title: Live: Golf Central
programme.desc: Golf Channel's flagship news program, the nightly "Golf Central" presents highlights from the major golf tours and world events, plus reports and features from tournament sites.

programme.title: PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: The Final Round of the 2026 Genesis Scottish Open continues at The Renaissance Club in Scotland. The final 18-hole loop will crown the champion and determine the division of the $9 million purse. The winner claims $1.62 million and 500 FedEx points.

programme.title: 2026 The Amundi Evian Championship
programme.desc: From Evian Resort Golf Club in Évian-les-Bains, Haute-Savoie, France.

programme.title: PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: The Final Round of the ISCO Championship 2026 continues at Hurstbourne Country Club in Louisville. The final 18-hole loop crowns the champion, awards 300 FedEx Cup points, and determines the distribution of the $4 million total purse.

programme.title: 2026 Kaulig Companies Championship
programme.desc: From Firestone Country Club South Course in Akron, Ohio.

programme.title: R&A - Live at the Range
programme.desc: An inside look into players' preparations, with coverage, statistics and insight from the practice range as competitors fine tune their game.

programme.title: Live: 5 Clubs With Gary Williams
programme.desc: Viewpoints of people in the game with people who love the game; we discuss what is of interest to them in the vast and deep reservoir of stories within the game of golf.

programme.title: Live From The Open
programme.desc: Comprehensive news coverage surrounding The Open focusing on emerging storylines, analysis, features and guest interviews.

programme.title: PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: The Final Round of the ISCO Championship 2026 continues at Hurstbourne Country Club in Louisville. The final 18-hole loop crowns the champion, awards 300 FedEx Cup points, and determines the distribution of the $4 million total purse.

programme.title: PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: The Final Round of the 2026 Genesis Scottish Open continues at The Renaissance Club in Scotland. The final 18-hole loop will crown the champion and determine the division of the $9 million purse. The winner claims $1.62 million and 500 FedEx points.

programme.title: Live From The Open
programme.desc: Comprehensive news coverage surrounding The Open focusing on emerging storylines, analysis, features and guest interviews.

programme.title: Women's College Lacrosse
programme.desc: Championship.

programme.title: Women's College Basketball
programme.desc: The Cardinals and Blue Devils clash in a massive ACC Championship showdown. Louisville enters on a solid two-game winning streak, while Duke brings their own late-season momentum. The ultimate ACC conference crown is on the line today.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: T. Rowe Price ACC Tournament concludes as No.1 Duke and No.10 Virginia fight for the title. The Blue Devils won the regular-season meeting, but the Cavaliers have won four straight games. A spot in the NCAA Tournament as a top seed is on the line.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 17 Cavaliers (10-2) and Blue Devils (7-5) compete for the ACC championship. Virginia defeated Duke 34-17 in November. Cavaliers senior J'Mari Taylor has rushed for 14 touchdowns. Blue Devils sophomore Darian Mensah boasts 28 touchdown passes.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: No. 20 Clemson (20-4, 10-1) hosts Virginia Tech (16-8, 5-6) at Littlejohn Coliseum. The Hokies look to end a two-game skid after falling to NC State, while the Tigers beat Cal for their fourth straight win and now seek a fifth in this ACC matchup.

programme.title: College Baseball
programme.desc: From English Field in Blacksburg, Va.

programme.title: Authentic ACC
programme.desc: In this edition of the series produced by Virginia Tech Athletics, get an inside look at Spring Football for the 2025 Virginia Tech Hokies.

programme.title: Women's College Basketball
programme.desc: The Gators (8-1) try to preserve their perfect SEC/ACC Challenge record as they visit the Hokies (6-2). Florida leads the all-time series 3-1 after the programs split a home-and-home set in 2013 and 2014. Virginia Tech is 5-0 at home this season.

programme.title: Men's College Soccer
programme.desc: From Thompson Field in Blacksburg, Va.

programme.title: Authentic ACC
programme.desc: In this edition of the series produced by Virginia Tech Athletics, get an inside look at Spring Football for the 2025 Virginia Tech Hokies.

programme.title: College Baseball
programme.desc: From English Field in Blacksburg, Va.

programme.title: College Softball
programme.desc: From Tech Softball Park in Blacksburg, Va.

programme.title: Men's College Wrestling
programme.desc: Action from college wrestling matches and tournaments.

programme.title: Authentic ACC
programme.desc: In this edition of the series produced by Virginia Tech Athletics, get an inside look at Spring Football for the 2025 Virginia Tech Hokies.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: The Cavaliers visit the Hokies at Cassell Coliseum for the first Commonwealth clash this season. Both teams are highly ranked, with Virginia losing only one match this season and Tech losing two. Forward Amani Hansberry leads the home offense.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: Mark Messier scored a hat trick on April 14, 1983.

programme.title: NHL Trophy Case
programme.desc: Diving into the Hart Trophy, the Vezina Trophy and the Lady Byng; featuring bites from marquee NHL players Tom Wilson, Leon Draisaitl, Connor McDavid, Robert Thomas, David Pastrnak and Morgan Rielly.

programme.title: NHL Trophy Case
programme.desc: NHL Trophy Case is a limited-run documentary series that takes a deep dive into the history, lore, and special meaning of the NHL's most storied trophies.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The Avalanche face the Kings at Crypto.com Arena for Game 4. Colorado leads 3-0 after a 4-2 Game 3 win. Cale Makar scored the tiebreaker, and Brock Nelson sealed the victory with an empty-net goal. Moore and Kempe provided the scoring for the Kings.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: Boston Bruins battle Buffalo Sabres in Game 5 of their playoff series at KeyBank Center. Buffalo holds a commanding 3-1 advantage in the best-of-seven series following a dominant 6-1 victory over Boston in Game 4 of the crucial postseason matchup.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: Boston and Buffalo continue their best-of-seven series in Game 6 at TD Garden. Boston won Game 5, while Buffalo leads the series 3-2. Jeremy Swayman made 26 saves, including a key pad stop. David Pastrnak scored to stave off the Bruins' elimination.

programme.title: Pioneers
programme.desc: Sit-down interview with one of the greatest players to ever play the game, "Mr. Hockey" Gordie Howe.

programme.title: Pioneers
programme.desc: Four-time Stanley Cup Champion, Ted Lindsay talks about his career in the NHL.

programme.title: Stanley Cup Films
programme.desc: The Detroit Red Wings meet the defending champion Montreal Canadiens in the 1954 Stanley Cup final.

programme.title: Stanley Cup Films
programme.desc: The Montreal Canadiens face the defending champion Detroit Red Wings in the 1955 Stanley Cup Final.

programme.title: NHL Network Countdown
programme.desc: NHL Network counts down great plays and memorable moments in hockey history.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: 2025 Stadium Series. From March 1, 2025. From Ohio Stadium.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The Rangers travel south to face the Panthers in a high-stakes match. Florida, the back-to-back Stanley Cup champion, looks to remain the top team in the Eastern Conference. Captain Aleksander Barkov is out for the season because of a major injury.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: From Raymond James Stadium in Tampa, Fla.

programme.title: Tampa Bay Lightning: Recharge
programme.desc: Following unprecedented back to back Stanley Cup runs, the Tampa Bay Lightning prepare to embark on the pursuit of a third consecutive championship.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: Game 1 of the Eastern Conference First Round between the Montreal Canadiens and the Tampa Bay Lightning takes place at Benchmark International Arena. The regular-season series was closely contested, with both teams splitting their four meetings 2-2.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The Canadiens face the Lightning in Game 2 of the East first round. Montreal leads 1-0 after a 4-3 win April 19. Juraj Slafkovsky had a hat trick, including the overtime winner; Brandon Hagel led Tampa Bay with two goals to force the extra period.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The Lightning face the Canadiens in Game 3 at Bell Centre. After Josh Anderson gave Montreal a 2-1 lead, Nikita Kucherov tied it at 12:33 of the third to force OT. J.J. Moser scored at 12:48 into OT to seal the Lightning's win in Game 2.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The Lightning face the Canadiens in Game 4 of the East first round. Montreal leads 2-1 after a Game 3 win. Brayden Point tied it for Tampa Bay with a power-play goal, but rookie Lane Hutson won it at 2:09 of overtime with a slap shot.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: Montreal faces Tampa Bay in Game 5 of the East First Round at Benchmark International Arena. The series remains tied 2-2 after the Lightning won Game 4. Zachary Bolduc and Cole Caufield staked Montreal to an early 2-0 lead before Tampa Bay rallied.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The Lightning and the Canadiens continue their series in Game 6 at Bell Centre. Montreal leads 3-2 after a Game 5 win. Brendan Gallagher opened the scoring for Montreal while rookie Jakub Dobes stopped 38 of 40 shots in the 3-2 Game 5 victory.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The Lightning host the Canadiens for a decisive Game 7 of the Eastern Conference First Round. Both teams recorded 106 points in the regular season. Tampa Bay forced this Game 7 with an overtime victory to avoid elimination in Game 6.

programme.title: Live: NHL Tonight
programme.desc: Whip around through live look-ins, real-time scores, breaking news and expert analysis with the studio hosts and seasoned NHL veterans. Stay on top of all the action around the league with NHL Tonight.

programme.title: NHL Tonight
programme.desc: Whip around through live look-ins, real-time scores, breaking news and expert analysis with the studio hosts and seasoned NHL veterans. Stay on top of all the action around the league with NHL Tonight.

programme.title: The Golf Scene
programme.desc: The Golf Scene features some of the top golf facilities in the Chicagoland area. The Golf Scene was voted the "Best Golf TV Show" award.

programme.desc: Hunting, boating, canoeing, camping, hiking, snowmobiling.

programme.title: Kash & Matty Talkin' Golf
programme.desc: Award winning golf journalist Steve Kashul, and Chicago area golf guru Matt Smith talk golf covering top Chicago area, Midwest, and national golf topics. Discussions include golf courses, equipment, apparel, and include interviews with golf personalities, tour pros, top swing instructors, and celebrities.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: From Rate Field in Chicago.

programme.desc: A lively sports podcast hosted by Brooke Fletcher and Dani Klupenger, blending game talk with pop culture, fashion, and more-giving women a fresh voice in the world of sports.

programme.title: Iowa Basketball Classic
programme.desc: Megan Gustafson scored a Big Ten Championship game record 45 points to lift the 2nd-seeded Hawkeyes to victory over the top-seeded Terrapins. From March 10, 2019.

programme.title: The B1G Moment
programme.desc: Caitlin Clark, Payton Sandfort and more take a look back on Iowa basketball's dramatic wins over Indiana and Michigan State during one weekend in February 2023 at Carver-Hawkeye Arena.

programme.title: Iowa Football Classic
programme.desc: Keith Duncan kicks a 48-yard field goal with one second remaining to push the 17th-ranked Hawkeyes past the Cornhuskers 27-24 in Lincoln. From Nov. 29, 2019.

programme.title: Iowa Football Classic
programme.desc: Iowa Freshman Keith Duncan kicks a game-winning 33-yard field goal as time expires to upset the 3rd-ranked Wolverines under the lights in Iowa City. From Nov. 12, 2016.

programme.title: Iowa Football Classic
programme.desc: After being down at halftime, the 11th-ranked Hawkeyes score 17 unanswered points in the second half and defeat the Badgers 20-10 at Camp Randall Stadium.

programme.title: The B1G Moment
programme.desc: The events leading up to Rob Houghtlin's last-second field goal that secured a victory for top-ranked Iowa over 2nd-ranked Michigan in 1985.

programme.title: Iowa Wrestling Classic
programme.desc: From Nov. 14, 2015.

programme.title: Iowa Wrestling Classic
programme.desc: From Jan. 31, 2020.

programme.title: The B1G Story
programme.desc: The story of two of the most polarizing wrestlers in the history of the sport, Tom and Terry Brands. See how these small-town Iowa twins grew up to become international wrestling stars, Olympic champions and distinguished coaches.

programme.title: Iowa Basketball Classic
programme.desc: The Hawkeyes rallied from an 11-point deficit in the last 55 seconds of regulation to force overtime in their victory against the Spartans. From Feb. 25, 2023.

programme.title: Iowa Basketball Classic
programme.desc: In their first home game following the tragic loss of Chris Street, the 11th-ranked Hawkeyes defeat the 5th-ranked Wolverines 88-80 with the help of Val Barnes' 27-point performance. From Jan. 31, 1993.

programme.title: The B1G Story
programme.desc: Thirty years after the tragic passing of Chris Street, see how #40's life and legacy continue to impact the Hawkeye basketball family.

programme.title: Women's College Soccer
programme.desc: From April 18, 2021.

programme.title: Women's College Volleyball
programme.desc: From College Avenue Gym in New Brunswick, N.J.

programme.title: USC Football Classic
programme.desc: Jayden Maiava threw for 265 yards and two touchdowns to help the Trojans beat the 15th-ranked Wolverines, 31-13. From Oct. 11, 2025.

programme.title: USC Basketball Classic
programme.desc: McKenzie Forbes scored 26 points to help 5th-ranked USC upset top-ranked Stanford to win the Pac-12 Tournament Title. From March 10, 2024.

programme.title: USC Volleyball Classic
programme.desc: From Sept. 15, 2023.

programme.title: USC Volleyball Classic
programme.desc: Ally Batenhorst led the 21st-ranked Trojans with 19 kills in their 3-1 victory over the 12th-ranked Golden Gophers. From Oct. 5, 2024.

programme.title: Women's College Lacrosse
programme.desc: From SHI Stadium in Piscataway, N.J.

programme.title: Live: B1G Today
programme.desc: Dave Revsine breaks down the biggest stories of the day from around the Big Ten. Hear from B1G analysts, coaches, players and more as they discuss a range of sports topics.

programme.title: B1G Today
programme.desc: Dave Revsine breaks down the biggest stories of the day from around the Big Ten. Hear from B1G analysts, coaches, players and more as they discuss a range of sports topics.

programme.title: B1G Plus Encore
programme.desc: Replays of the best action from Big Ten contests.

programme.title: B1G Today
programme.desc: Dave Revsine breaks down the biggest stories of the day from around the Big Ten. Hear from B1G analysts, coaches, players and more as they discuss a range of sports topics.

programme.title: B1G Trailblazers
programme.desc: Lizette Salas sits down with Dave Revsine to discuss her story as a first-generation college graduate, daughter of Mexican immigrants, and member of USC's Women's Golf Team. She shares her experience and struggles of belonging in the world of golf while competing at the top of the sport, ultimately becoming a trailblazer paving the way for generations to come.

programme.title: B1G Today
programme.desc: Dave Revsine breaks down the biggest stories of the day from around the Big Ten. Hear from B1G analysts, coaches, players and more as they discuss a range of sports topics.

programme.desc: Breaking down the biggest stories in sports betting from the night before and getting you up to speed as a new day begins; we break down the NBA Playoffs, the NHL Stanley Cup Playoffs, MLB, and the kick-off to the WNBA season and more!

programme.desc: Weekly wrap-up of basketball action from around the world including features on the world's top players, leagues and tournaments.
